expected_use_case: Balanced medium LoRA training with 500 examples for a better demo than the smoke dataset.
colab_gpu_note: Recommended for a Colab T4/L4 GPU runtime. Training time is longer than the smoke config.
notes: Use this when the demo has enough time for more examples than the curated smoke set.
Keep batch size 1 on limited VRAM and increase gradient accumulation if needed.
If CUDA OOM occurs, reduce max_samples or max_sequence_length.
